title: 11 Creating Electronic Bill Payment Trace Requests Outside of OLT
body_text:
11 	Creating Electronic Bill Payment Trace Requests Outside of OLT
11.1	Overview of Creating Electronic Bill Payment Trace Requests Outside of OLT
Trace requests must be created on OLT unless
the transaction was created more than one year ago. The OLT database contains data for one year only; or
the transaction can芒聙聶t be located on OLT. Before initiating a trace outside of OLT, the Tracer or SuperTracer must verify the transaction details, re-enter the search criteria on OLT, and confirm that the transaction was successfully remitted to Central 1; or
OLT is unavailable.
If the above conditions apply and the trace can芒聙聶t be created on OLT, submit the trace request via ServiceNow. If ServiceNow is unavailable, complete the Electronic Bill Payment Trace Request, Form 1406, and forward it to Central聽1.
Central 1 will respond to electronic bill payment trace requests and will provide settlement, if applicable.
11.2	Submitting Electronic Bill Payment Trace Requests via ServiceNow
Proceed as follows to submit a bill payment trace request via ServiceNow:
Phone Central 1, Electronic Bill Payments, to advise that the trace can芒聙聶t be completed on OLT. See Section 1.5, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources.
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	You芒聙聶ll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if it芒聙聶s your first login to the Client Centre, you芒聙聶ve deleted your cookies, or you芒聙聶re using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
ServiceNow
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If you芒聙聶ve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under 芒聙聹My Favourites芒聙聺.
Figure 3: Accessing ServiceNow
Select
Service Catalogue
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Select Service Catalogue
Select
Electronic Payments
,
and then select
Electronic Bill Payment Trace Request
. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Electronic Payments 芒聙聯 Electronic Bill Payment Trace Request
Complete the Electronic Bill Payment Trace Request page as follows. See Figure 6.
Note:	Mandatory fields are highlighted red.
芒聭
Enter your transit number.
芒聭隆
Use the drop-down menu to select the reason for the trace and the type of error. Additional fields may require completion depending on the type of error selected.
芒聭垄
Enter the member芒聙聶s name and phone number (optional).
芒聭拢
Enter the details of the transaction.
芒聭陇
Enter the transit number that will be debited (if applicable) and the branch name.
芒聭楼
Enter additional comments if necessary.
芒聭娄
Select
Submit
. The request is sent to Central 1 and a ServiceNow ticket number is created.
Figure 6: Electronic Bill Payment Trace Request
Central 1 will enter the transaction details on OLT. Once the results of the trace request are available from the biller, Central 1 will update the status of the trace request on OLT.
11.3	Submitting Electronic Bill Payment Requests Manually
If an electronic bill payment trace request can芒聙聶t be created on OLT and ServiceNow is unavailable, complete the Electronic Bill Payment Trace Request, Form 1406. Central 1 will only accept this form if ServiceNow is unavailable. Proceed as follows:
Phone Central 1, Electronic Bill Payments, to advise that the trace can芒聙聶t be completed on OLT. See Section 1.5, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources.
Complete the Electronic Bill Payment Trace Request, Form 1406. Completion of this form is self-explanatory. See Figure 7.
Figure 7: Electronic Bill Payment Trace Request, Form 1406
Send the form to Central 1 as directed on the form.
Central 1 will enter the transaction details on OLT. Once the results of the trace request are available from the biller, Central 1 will update the status of the trace request on OLT.
END
